title: Finance automation startup ZenStatement raises $1.6 million in seed funding | Medial
full_text: Title: Finance automation startup ZenStatement raises $1.6 million in seed funding | Medial ## Finance automation startup ZenStatement raises $1.6 million in seed funding. Finance automation startup ZenStatement raises $1.6 million in seed funding. ### - Finance automation and cash flow management platform ZenStatement has raised $1.62 million in a funding round led by 3One4 Capital and Boldcap VC. - Figr, an AI-powered design platform, secured $2.25 million in Series A funding led by Kalaari Capital. - ZenStatement, an AI-powered finance automation and cashflow management platform, raised $1.62 million in seed funding led by 3One4 Capital and Boldcap VC. Illumine-i raised $2 million in a Series A funding round from Anicut Capital to expand into new markets and focus on automation and digitization. AI startup Segwise raised $1.6 million in a pre-seed funding round led by Powerhouse Ventures to build AI agents for product growth. ### Boxs today announced it has raised $1.6 million in a seed funding round led by Surge, a rapid scale-up program by Peak XV. ### Bluecopa, a finance automation startup based in Hyderabad, has secured $7.5 million in a Series A funding round, led by Analog Partners, along with Blume Ventures and Dallas Venture Capital. ### Anscer Robotics, a Bengaluru-based developer of intelligent autonomous mobile robots (AMRs), has raised $2 million in a seed funding round led by Info Edge Ventures. ### Flowla, a London-based AI platform for sales and customer success automation, raised $2.5 million in Seed funding led by Revo Capital. ### Mysa, a B2B fintech startup, raised $3.4 million in funding co-led by Blume Ventures and Piper Serica, increasing its total funding to $6.2 million. ### Sequence, a startup focused on AI-driven revenue operations automation, secured $20 million in Series A funding led by 645 Ventures. ## Graph AI raises $3 million seed funding for drug safety platform - The Economic Times. Graph AI raises $3 million seed funding for drug safety platform - The Economic Times. ### Graph AI, a California-based AI life sciences startup, raised $3 million in seed funding to innovate pharmacovigilance using AI-driven automation. ### Delhi-based startup ControlZ has raised $3 million in seed funding, led by 9Unicorn and Venture Catalysts. / score=0.287 / query=AI workflow automation startup raises venture funding 2026 / intent=find_startups / path=capital_startup
